# YANP TUI Roadmap v0.2.0

The next milestone after `v0.1.0-alpha.1` is `v0.2.0`.

## Focus

- Periodic note creation for `daily/`, `weekly/`, and `monthly/`
- Stronger dashboard widgets and saved queries
- Expanded vault health reporting beyond duplicate targets
- Workflow polish for create, rename, and publish

## Success Criteria

- Periodic notes are easy to create in the TUI
- The dashboard feels useful as a daily landing screen
- Health reporting covers more than duplicate conflict resolution
- Docs and release notes stay in sync with the app
